name: @moolam/runtime-harness
description: Internal component of Sutra SDK — applications should install sutra-sdk. Runtime harness core: streaming turn host, token parser, sandbox seam, and abort pipeline. Consumes frozen A P6 harness frame contracts from @moolam/sync-protocol; does not redefine wire shapes.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/cognitive-core run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/learning run build && node --test tests/streaming_turn_host_scaffold.test.mjs tests/streaming_turn_host_emitter.test.mjs tests/stream_frame_buffer.test.mjs tests/last_event_id_resume.test.mjs tests/replay_reconnect_integration.test.mjs tests/tool_call_parser.test.mjs tests/tool_call_parser_tag_fragments.test.mjs tests/tool_call_parser_deadline.test.mjs tests/golden_turn_loader.test.mjs tests/golden_turn_replay.test.mjs tests/golden_turn_chunk_fuzz.test.mjs tests/malformed_fence_golden.test.mjs tests/golden_replay_operator_doc.test.mjs tests/sandbox_seam.test.mjs tests/sandbox_seam_schema.test.mjs tests/sandbox_seam_deadline_kill.test.mjs tests/correction_loop.test.mjs tests/correction_loop_host.test.mjs tests/correction_cap_escalation.test.mjs tests/abort_pipeline.test.mjs tests/abort_pipeline_rollback.test.mjs tests/abort_pipeline_audit.test.mjs tests/turn_meter.test.mjs tests/turn_meter_emit.test.mjs tests/golden_meter_reconcile.test.mjs tests/budget_manager.test.mjs tests/budget_gate_host.test.mjs tests/budget_exceeded_integration.test.mjs tests/prompt_cache_assembly.test.mjs tests/prompt_cache_bindings_hash.test.mjs tests/prompt_cache_determinism.test.mjs tests/prompt_cache_store.test.mjs tests/prompt_cache_meter_wire.test.mjs tests/context_budget_manager.test.mjs tests/context_budget_truncation.test.mjs tests/context_budget_threshold.test.mjs tests/compaction_summary.test.mjs tests/compaction_trigger.test.mjs tests/compaction_retention_golden.test.mjs tests/session_store.test.mjs tests/session_rehydrate.test.mjs tests/session_rehydrate_integration.test.mjs tests/degradation_registry_load.test.mjs tests/degradation_registry_invoke.test.mjs tests/degradation_registry_behavior.test.mjs tests/approval_surface.test.mjs tests/outcome_signal_e2e.test.mjs tests/production_turn_loop.test.mjs tests/remediation_policy.test.mjs tests/remediation_executor.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/remediation_fixtures_integration.test.mjs
scripts.test:degradation-drills: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@moolam/runtime-harness && node --test test/degradation_drills/model_down.test.mjs test/degradation_drills/sync_down.test.mjs test/degradation_drills/tool_down.test.mjs
